charter: M20: derive and implement the next VISION-aligned tusq.dev increment: an opt-in local execution-policy scaffold for the MCP serve path. The goal is to move beyond describe-only toward safe execution wrappers without live product side effects: validate tools/call arguments against approved compiled tool schemas, require explicit opt-in policy, and return auditable dry-run execution plans/metadata. Keep all work repo-local/offline and governed.
acceptance_contract: PM derives M20 planning artifacts from VISION.md and current roadmap
scope stays local/offline and does not perform live product API execution
design covers opt-in execution policy for tusq serve/tools-call dry-run path
acceptance criteria require argument validation against compiled tool schemas and auditable dry-run result metadata
planning updates identify docs/tests needed before implementation

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
